title: selaginella pouzolziana
intro: Selaginella pouzolziana, also known as the Algerian spike moss or spike moss, is a species of plant in the family Selaginellaceae, which is a type of spore-producing, non-vascular plant commonly known as a spike moss. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella pouzolziana include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and boosting the immune system. It is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal supplements, to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
